source.description: Global Active Archive of Large Flood Events from the Dartmouth Flood Observatory (DFO). Contains major flood events worldwide with extent, duration, and impact data.

metrics.area_km2: Flood extent area in square kilometers
metrics.duration_days: Duration of flood event in days
metrics.deaths: Number of deaths attributed to the flood
metrics.displaced: Number of people displaced by the flood

geographic_context.focus: Large flood events detected via satellite and news reports
admin_levels: Point locations with flood extent polygons

data_quality_notes: Only includes large-scale flood events meeting DFO criteria
Flood extent polygons available for most events (has_geometry flag)
Death and displacement figures from news reports may be estimates
dfo_id links to original DFO database record
glide_index provides cross-reference to GLIDE disaster database
